examples: Multilevel categories in the view might not work properly.
I employed XSL to build the SQL using a multilevel transformation.
The technology of multilevel is a usual way to solve this problem.
The Venezia, for example, will have 2-acre waterscapes, multilevel pools and an observatory at 600 feet.
The multilevel sales organization Amway (a unit of Alticor) took decades to get established.
